sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93238" key="sanna/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαννάκιον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰκ]</pron> or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάννᾰκρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n93238.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cup</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0487.tlg001:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
